text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Very well then! Let us begin our Team Bakushin training! Is everyone
ready?

text_block_list.name: All
text_block_list.text:
Yes!
Yup!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to see where everyone's endurance is at, so let's run some
ramps!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A suggestion! Let's do the ramped course on unicycles! I found some
in the equipment shed this morning!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What?! Why unicycles all of a sudden?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? There's a good reason why I made the suggestion...
Because it'd be fun, duh!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Is that it? So it doesn't have anything to do with endurance?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I'll up the ante then! Whoever can complete the course within
the fewest pedals wins!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A friendly competition? Sounds fun! Oh, we should probably cover
the track with some planks, right? I'll do that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That's the spirit! All right! Well, today's training will be a unicycle
battle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoever comes in last place has to buy us all yakisoba buns on the
way home!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You're on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hey, sorry to leave you with the first running segment.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's fine... You'd be hopeless if the mission was something finicky like
kendama or a 3-point shot anyway.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Top Road's swimming is as dynamic as a dolphin show!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
W-wait... She's making such a splash, she's about to drown Doto next
to her!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh look, Top Road is comi—weeegh! She's driven her whole bike into
a bush!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! A rendezvous with the tree fairies cleverly disguised as
an unfortunate blunder! Wish I'd thought of that one!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not like you usually have any reason to ride a bike. It's faster
to run, so it makes sense you can't ride one.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm not very good with intricate stuff. I actually wasn't going to
enter the triathlon because of that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But since I've been trusted with the running section, I'm going to rise
to the responsibility! So Ayabe, please do a partner run with me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: (Ayabe is still behind me, so if I just sprint now... I can make it!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Haaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe?! Where did that speed come from?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Guh... RRRAH!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(I guess I have to start sprinting earlier... But if the distance was just a
bit longer, then that timing would've worked...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Do you want to run the same distance again for the next one? I'd
like to try a longer one if you're up for it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's try a longer race this time!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's about time I started heading home.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ah... I'm going to stay and run a little bit longer!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay. Don't overdo it though. Well, see you later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Thank you for today! Bye!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(I realized while I was running with Ayabe... I need to learn more
about pacing and positioning.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(I was too clumsy for swimming and cycling, so I have to put my all
into running!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm going to put aside more time for research and training!
